current.summary: Designed and began implementing PostHog telemetry for syllago — brainstorm, panel review, plan, validation, bead creation, and Tasks 1-3 executed.

activeWork.description: PostHog telemetry integration — anonymous opt-out usage analytics
activeWork.progress: Tasks 1-3 complete (config read/write, ID generation, DO_NOT_TRACK). 6 beads closed, 21 remaining. Next up is Task 4 (core Init/Track/Shutdown) — the biggest single task.

git.lastCommit: 9fc8bc0 fix: lint issues in telemetry package (errcheck, De Morgan)

recentDecisions: PostHog Cloud with configurable endpoint for self-hosted enterprise deployments
Opt-out (enabled by default) with first-run notice to stderr on any invocation
DO_NOT_TRACK accepts any truthy value (1, true, yes, on) — not just '1'
Unreadable/unwritable config defaults to telemetry DISABLED (safe default)
System-level config at /etc/syllago/telemetry.json for fleet management
Anonymous ID documented as pseudonymous, not truly anonymous
1 year data retention (PostHog Cloud free tier default)
Data deletion via email process with anonymous ID
nextSteps: Execute Task 4 (syllago-qyhwp): Core Init/Track/Shutdown — the largest task, includes httptest-based Track() tests, Init() order of operations, and Shutdown() with 2s timeout
Execute Tasks 5a-5c: telemetry subcommand (status/on/off/reset) with --json support
Continue sequential execution through remaining beads (midpoint checkpoint after Task 5c, then Tasks 6, 8, 9a-9e, 10, 11)

context.notes: Design went through a 3-persona panel review (privacy dev, enterprise platform eng, OSS maintainer) — 23 issues found and all applied. Phase B blocker analysis caught 4 real bugs in the plan before any code was written (missing import, dead export_cmd, wrong var names in add_cmd, structural mismatch in convert_cmd). Sequential execution mode chosen. The PostHog API key is in the design doc's Key Decisions table — needs to go into GitHub Actions secrets as SYLLAGO_POSTHOG_KEY for Task 10.
